mapper.select: select id, username, password, real_name as realName, phone, role, status, created_time as createdAt, updated_time as updatedAt from sys_user where is_deleted = 0 and ( role_code in ('OWNER', 'DESK') or role in ('owner', 'desk') ) and ( #{keyword} is null or #{keyword} = '' or username like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or real_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or phone like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') ) order by id desc
